Interface Metamodel.Type

All Superinterfaces:
Metamodel.Named
All Known Subinterfaces:
Metamodel.BasicType, Metamodel.Enumerated, Metamodel.Featured, Metamodel.ObjectType, Metamodel.Primitive, Metamodel.RecordType, Metamodel.Slotted
All Known Implementing Classes:
EcoreEnumValue, EcoreMetamodel.EcoreObjectType, EcoreMetamodel.EcoreRecordType, EcoreMetamodel.EcoreSlotted, EcoreMetamodel.EcoreType, EcorePrimitiveValue, EcoreValue
Enclosing interface:
Metamodel
public static interface Metamodel.Type extends Metamodel.Named
The basic interface for all types.
